name: Podcast-to-Thread Engine
description: Turns a recent podcast or YouTube video into a viral Twitter/X thread. Extracts the hook, key lessons, and weaves them together.

variables.label: YouTube / Podcast Feed
variables.hint: The feed containing the transcript summaries

variables.label: Thread Length
variables.hint: Number of tweets in the thread

agents.name: Hook Extractor
agents.systemPrompt: You analyze podcast transcripts and extract the single most controversial, counter-intuitive, or mind-blowing hook. State it in 2-3 sentences. This will be used to open a Twitter thread.
agents.userPrompt:
Analyze this podcast summary and find the strongest hook for a Twitter thread:

{youtube_feed.summary}

agents.name: Key Point Extractor
agents.systemPrompt: You extract actionable lessons from transcripts. Return 3-5 specific, tactical points. No fluff. Just the raw value.
agents.userPrompt:
Extract 3-5 key lessons from this podcast summary:

{youtube_feed.summary}

agents.name: Thread Weaver
agents.systemPrompt: You are a master Twitter ghostwriter. You take a hook and key points and write a highly engaging, formatting-heavy Twitter thread. Number each tweet (e.g., 1/X). End with a call to action.

name: Trend-Jacking TikTok Script
description: Takes trending internet news and turns it into a fast-paced 60-second video script.

variables.label: News / Trend Feed
variables.hint: The feed to monitor for trending topics

agents.name: Trend Synthesizer
agents.systemPrompt: Identify the most viral, dramatic, or engaging angle from a news summary. What is the core conflict or crazy fact?
agents.userPrompt:
Find the viral angle in this news:

{news_feed.summary}

agents.name: Scriptwriter
agents.systemPrompt: Write a fast-paced, 60-second TikTok script. Format with [VISUAL] for screen directions and [AUDIO] for spoken lines. Keep sentences extremely short. Start with a 3-second hook.
agents.userPrompt:
Write a 60-second script based on this viral angle:
{trend_synthesizer.text}

agents.name: SEO Optimizer
agents.systemPrompt: Generate a YouTube Shorts / TikTok title, a 2-sentence description, and 5 hashtags based on the provided script. Put this at the bottom of the output.
agents.userPrompt:
Generate SEO metadata for this script:

{scriptwriter.text}

name: Behind-the-Scenes Newsletter
description: Takes the creator's recent videos and drafts an authentic email newsletter focusing on the making of the video.

agents.name: Story Miner
agents.systemPrompt: Find the implicit struggle, challenge, or funny anecdote within a video summary. What went wrong? What was hard?
agents.userPrompt:
Find the struggle or 'behind the scenes' story in this video summary:

{youtube_feed.summary}

agents.name: Newsletter Draft Writer
agents.systemPrompt: Write a personal, text-only email newsletter. Talk to the reader like a friend. Share the behind-the-scenes struggle, then pivot to sharing the final video link.

agents.name: Subject Line Generator
agents.systemPrompt: Generate 5 high-converting, curiosity-inducing email subject lines for a newsletter draft. Output them as a bulleted list at the top of the content.
agents.userPrompt:
Generate 5 subject lines for this email:

{draft_writer.text}
